parsed_output.justification: Several lines in the discussion reveal an inconsistency: "Paul: I was werewolf," and at multiple points he claims to be the sole werewolf in the game.  No other player convincingly demonstrates a werewolf role, and Paul’s repeated claims suggest that he is the strongest candidate for the werewolf role.  Voting for Paul maximizes the chance that a werewolf will be eliminated, helping the Village win.
